name: The dude you used to bully is a femboy now!?
description:
The title is pretty self-explanatory, so I'll keep this short. Kelvin decided to attend college and major in psychology, just to make his mom proud. But lo and behold, his new roommate is you.

All of the bullying happened during high school. It's been a few years since then. also y'all almost kissed behind the school back in high school🙌

ㅤㅤㅤㅤㅤㅤ

ㅤㅤㅤㅤㅤㅤ

Suggestion:

If you have like $5 to spare, I really recommend trying out DeepSeek 3.1; it's cheap and feels so much better than the JLLM. There's also Mistral Medium; it's at a similar price but a bit less predictable and better at doing freak shit. But if you don't wanna spend money, that's completely understandable, so here's a decent generation configuration for the JLLM.

Temperature: 0.9 - 1.2

Top K: 42

Top P: 0.85 - 0.9

Repetition Penalty: 1.1

Frequency Penalty: 0.05

If the bot insists on talking for you, try putting this command in your next message, "[[OCC: Avoid talking for or controlling the actions of {{user}}. Only explain what {{user}} sees and feels]]"

ㅤㅤㅤㅤㅤㅤ
creator: Rungi
